name: Fan Spotlight
description: Features fan-generated content, stories, or standout supporter moments. Strengthens the community bond between the club and its supporters.

fan_story.example: A lifelong Blue who has attended every home match since 2003. Marko's passion is the heartbeat of Main Venue.

guidelines: Use the fan's submitted photo as the hero image with a branded frame overlay. The fan spotlight badge distinguishes this as a series. Include the fan's first name and city. The story excerpt should be warm and celebratory. Always credit the fan. Encourage submissions with the CTA. Obtain photo permissions before publishing.
